name: Page
description: A single navigable page in a builder site. Its layout is a grid config, and it may contain nested sub-pages to any depth.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Stable handle used by the nav sidebar to switch/route to this page.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Page title; doubles as the navigation label.

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description: The page's grid model, in the same format the runtime grid plugin consumes.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Sub-pages reachable from this page's nav menu, nestable to any depth.
